vehicle_information.notes: The Grand C-Max shares the C-Max CB7 security family. The professional Ford transponder catalogue places C-Max 2010-2015 in DST80/ID63-6F. Silca lists C-Max CB7 2010-2015 with HU101 and 433 MHz. Tool IDs and exact OEM remote part numbers remain to be mapped.
